title: Cuneiform Tablet #0274: Neo-Assyrian Adoption
description: A cuneiform tablet from the Neo-Assyrian period — a adoption document preserved on clay.
introduction: A cuneiform tablet from the Neo-Assyrian period — a adoption document preserved on clay.

translation.text: Cuneiform tablet of the Neo-Assyrian period. Adoption document. Inscribed on clay in cuneiform script. The tablet records adoption matters typical of Neo-Assyrian period administrative or literary practice.
